notes: NEW: Speed Ramp tool - build hold/ramp speed programs (up to 10000%) with Gentle/Standard/Sharp curves and presets that sync across your machines. AI Rough Cut: one window from brief to build (thumbnails, 10 styles, model picker, self-review), segment mode to extend the current timeline, music bed placement, and no more 1-frame black gaps. Rich analysis now returns a timestamped visual timeline per clip; tiers simplified to Basic and Rich. Camera proxies (BRAW/Sony) are analyzed automatically. Resolve sync self-heals when the wrong project is open. Models auto-unload after 5 idle minutes to give memory back to Resolve. UI: state colors everywhere (purple waiting / blue working / green done), reorganized tool tiles, per-project 'Reset ingest data'.
